title: Profile: Account
summary: Account settings for the current user.

sections.title: Username/Author
sections.markdown: This is your login username and public author path. It is managed in **System > Users**.

sections.title: Role
sections.markdown: Your role is managed in **System > Users**. It is shown here for reference only.

sections.title: E-mail address
sections.markdown: Used for account-related mail and mail-backed features. If self-service e-mail changes are allowed, a confirmation link should be sent to the new address before the change takes effect.

sections.title: Timezone
sections.markdown: Used for your account-level time display. Leave it blank to use the current site timezone.

sections.title: Theme mode
sections.markdown: Sets your default admin theme mode. A browser-level override can still take precedence.

sections.title: Password
sections.markdown: Leave the password fields blank unless you want to change your password.
